meaning: n.昼夜平分点,春分或秋分
examples: In the Chinese calendar, the Spring Equinox always occurs in the second month.
Spring Equinox means the most exciting days of spring have come.
Spring Equinox (春分) is the fourth of the24 solar term (节气) .
At least one graduate of now-defunct Equinox, Edward Lamont, made his way to BigSmart.
Another pyramid called Equinox International enlisted 250, 000 distributors before being shut down by regulators in April.
